title: nephrodium glabratum
intro: Nephrodium glabratum, a species of fern belonging to the family Matoniaceae, is a type of vascular plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Nephrodium glabratum include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and act as a remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Nephrodium glabratum can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and powdering its leaves for use in capsules or topical ointments.
